rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 11, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Terminating Sanctions GRANTED. rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND PARKER-GAYLORD VS. DEUTSCHE BANK, NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE et al

DEFENDANTs DEUTSCHE BANK, NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE, OCWEN LOAN SERVICES, LLC, WESTERN PROGRESSIVE, LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend to allege each element of Plaintiff's causes of action addressing in good faith issues raised by the demurrer, i.e. assignment, HBOR, and promissory estoppel. = (501/REQ)
